outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources shows reduced drilling activity heading into Q3 2023, with only 11 active sites detected via SAR and a relative activity delta of -50%, driven by half the usual number of continuously active pads. This contraction suggests near-term production pressure despite stable WTI averaging $55.25 and full exposure to the segment. With realized prices at a 8% discount to benchmark and limited new pad activation, the deterministic revenue forecast settles at approximately $686 million.
